subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire that blazeth in the Tree of Sinai! We have broken the seal of that fragrance which perfumeth all spirits [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اشتعل بالنار الموقده فی سدره السیناء قد فضضنا ختام عطر الارواح فتعطر
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation
